description: CompositionBeige wrinkle free trousers made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with button closures, brand badge above the right pocket, belt loops on the waist, reinforced stitch detailing along the crotch area, snipped edged hem that can be altered according to convenience, a zipper and button closureFitRegularWash careNormal machine wash with like colours in warm water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringDry in shadeWarm iron Do not iron on decorationsCrafted from 100% cotton, this pair of chinos from the arrow Ultimo Collection is lightweight and comfortable. The fine tailoring ensures an excellent fit, offering a flattering silhouette and making it an essential addition to your casual wardrobe. Pair it with a casual shirt and leather shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size 32, length 41.5& rdquo on a model of height 6' and waist 32& rdquo
